Sun En Ś≠ęśĀ©
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Sun En (Ś≠ęśĀ©). Younger brother of Sun Chen, he was sent to escort Sun Xiu to take the throne. Sun En was affiliated with the Wu Kingdom. Sun En lived during the Three Kingdoms period of Chinese history.
